text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O has been struggling somewhat
in training lately, so we decide to pay a visit to
the local shrine.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ardan? What a coincidence. Are you here to
pray?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I decided to stop by during my walk. I'm
taking a moment to admire the guardian
lion-dogs.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Their stature conveys a reliable strength, yet the
form they take reminds me of the sweet therapy
dog I met as a child.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Therapy dogs? You mean the ones that keep
people company when they're sick?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. When I was too ill to even leave my
house, we would have a dog come visit and play
with me every once in a while.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Thinking about that dear pup makes me
want to see it again.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Interesting... But it's definitely true that being
with a doggy can help cheer you up when you're
feeling down.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Actually, why don't we go to a dog cafe now? We
can play with all kinds of doggies while enjoying
tea there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, such a wonderful place exists? I'd love
to go.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You're okay with that, right, Trainer? Great! Then
let me just pray real quick, and we'll be off!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
May I continue to enjoy running! And may good
things happen to everyone around me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm back! Let me just make sure the cafe is open
right now...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, good! It's open and... Wait, what?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh! They're holding a special event right
now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, you can paint on the doggies' paw
pads and make art with their prints!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: My, that sounds like a lot of fun.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't it?! I can't even imagine how cute it's
going to be!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I guess my prayers were answered.
Something good happened right away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This turn of events puts Sakura Chiyono O in a
great mood, and all that positive energy helps her
bounce back in training, too!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
What?! They're temporarily closed! I'm sorry... It
looks like we're not going to a dog cafe today...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I see... Well, we can go another time...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I suppose... but I was so ready to cuddle doggies
with all my might...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Now what am I supposed to do?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, our shrine visit doesn't do much to
help Sakura Chiyono O's mood...
